approach: RE-OPEN (owner-ratified in-session): pod.feature scenario 'handled mail is acked immediately' names the mechanic as `cyberlegion mail read`, which today only peeks -> stale/self-contradictory. Rewrite the Then mechanic to `cyberlegion mail read --ack`. Not a narrowing of the acceptance criterion (still: acked immediately, never left unread) -> no Clearance floor.
ADD (additive -> self-clears): a scenario that Pod receives its mission brief with read --ack so the brief is consumed in the same step, no dangling unread mail.
Update plugins/cyberfleet/skills/pod/SKILL.md brief-receive + handled-mail lines to the combined op to match the frozen suite.

note: frozen pod.feature scenario 'handled mail is acked immediately' pinned the mechanic as `cyberlegion mail read`, which today only peeks (never acks) -> the frozen scenario was self-contradictory. Owner ratified the re-open in-session; rewrote the Then mechanic to `cyberlegion mail read --ack`. Acceptance criterion unchanged (acked immediately, never left unread) -> not a narrowing, no Clearance floor.

why: pod.feature: 1 owner-ratified re-open (rewrote stale mechanic `cyberlegion mail read` -> `cyberlegion mail read --ack` on 'handled mail is acked immediately'; corrects a factually-wrong peek-that-claims-to-ack, does not weaken the criterion) + 1 additive scenario 'Pod consumes its mission brief in one read-and-ack step' (brief consumed same step it is read, no dangling unread mail). Cold ACED spec-judge ALIGNED true (oracle/builder/architect all PASS); new scenario non-duplicative of the entry inbox-peek scenario. Pre-existing base parse breakage (line-wrapped Given ~line 22 + stray trailing </content>) confirmed on main, unrelated to #173, left out of scope as a hygiene follow-up. Floor: none (no acceptance scenario weakened/deleted). Stays @frozen.
